name_en: Original Fendi latest denim embroidery Baguette. The denim Baguette is definitely a fashion hit this summer! Denim looks great and has a high appearance rate; it's perfect for styling. It's very lightweight and has great capacity, easily meeting daily needs. Comes with a short strap and a wide strap, can be worn over the shoulder, crossbody, or handheld. Very versatile, easy to handle any style. Wear it and you'll be the brightest goddess in the crowd!

0159B89
